headline: Amcor Launches First Moda Vacuum Sealing Technology in Brazil
summary: AMCR brings its first Moda vacuum sealing system to Brazil, helping Barra Mansa boost capacity, vacuum packaging and efficiency.

headline: My Top 5 Dividend Picks For June
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper, Novo Nordisk, Sonoco Products, Domino's Pizza, and Realty Income are top June dividend picks. Read more on KDP, NVO, SON, DPZ, O stocks here.
